Reason_for_Visit.summary: Patient with a history of breast cancer, stage IIA, estrogen receptor positive, metastatic disease, seeking care at our clinic due to convenience

Cancer_Diagnosis.Distant_Metastasis: Yes, to neck, chest, abdomen, and pelvis

Clinical_Findings.findings: No abnormal areas of FDG uptake to suggest active metastatic disease. Decreased prominence of uptake in the head and neck region consistent with brown fat. No pulmonary consolidations or metastases noted. Small lymph node felt in left axilla <1cm.

current_meds: trastuzumab (HERCEPTIN IV), exemestane (Aromasin), levothyroxine (SYNTHROID), loperamide (IMODIUM), loratadine (CLARITIN), magnesium oxide (MAG-OX), melatonin 5 mg tablet, omega-3 fatty acids 1,000 mg capsule, omeprazole (PRILOSEC), pertuzumab (Perjeta), thiamine HCl, vitamin B1, (VITAMIN B-1), ascorbic acid, vitamin C, (VITAMIN C) 500 mg tablet, bismuth subsalicylate (PEPTO BISMOL) suspension, cholecalciferol, vitamin D3, 1,000 unit CAP, coenzyme Q10 100 mg capsule, cyanocobalamin (VITAMIN B-12) 500 mcg tablet, diphenhydrAMINE (BENADRYL) 25 mg tablet, EPINEPHrine (EPIPEN) 0.3 mg/0.3 mL injection, fluticasone propionate (FLONASE) 50 mcg/actuation nasal spray, latanoprost (XALATAN) 0.005 % ophthalmic solution
